title: End City Loot
quickAnswer: End cities are among the best loot structures in the game because they provide shulker shells, enchanted diamond gear, and possibly an elytra if the city has a ship.
keyFacts: Only end ships contain elytra, so not every end city gives the headline reward.
Shulkers supply shells for shulker boxes, which are a major inventory upgrade.
Levitation and void exposure make movement mistakes more dangerous than the mobs themselves.
commonMistakes: Assuming every city includes a ship.
Looking down only at mobs and falling or launching yourself into a bad position.
